nasb.text: For there were those who said, “We, our sons and our daughters are many; therefore let us get grain that we may eat and live.”

esv.text: For there were those who said, “With our sons and our daughters, we are many. So let us get grain, that we may eat and keep alive.”

cnv.text: 有些人說：“我們和兒女人口眾多，給我們五穀餬口，可以存活。”

ccb.text: 有的说：“我们和我们的儿女人口众多，需要粮食来活命。”
